steps.title: Isolate the y term
steps.content:
Start with the equation and move the $x$-term to the other side:
$$
12x-4y=-18
$$
$$
-4y=-12x-18
$$

steps.title: Read the slope
steps.content: Divide by $-4$ to write the line in slope-intercept form: $$ y=3x+\frac{9}{2} $$ The coefficient of $x$ is the slope. The answer is D.
